meaning: n.钉,栓,桩,销子,借口vt.钉木钉,固定,限制vi.坚持不懈地工作 Peg 佩格(女子名)
examples: His work jacket hung on the peg in the kitchen.
He hung his hat on a peg and flung himself into his seat with business-like alacrity.
In his dream, he saw that his sheepfold was destroyed, the shepherd disappeared, and his holy grail fell off the peg.
This is substantial growth, and gives Netflix a PEG of just under 2.0 for 2014.
In tests, Viraferon peg cleared the virus from between 54% and 61% of patients.
